label: Transparent Paper Wasp motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Paper Wasp transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated paper wasp nest motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: a small exposed paper wasp nest made from layered grey tan paper fibers, visible hexagonal comb cells, short attachment stem, a few accurate paper wasps perched on the nest with amber legs, black banding, translucent smoky wings, slender bodies, crisp silhouettes, natural dry-garden material detail.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the entire nest, comb geometry, attachment stem, and wasps without cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves amber black paper grey colors, paper fiber texture, and alert structured geometry.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Keep the subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges and generous padding. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no flowers, no honeycomb frame, no bee hive box, no honey bees, no landscape, no extra insects away from the nest, no text, no watermark, no props, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Create a 3840 x 2160 pixel 16:9 landscape image. Do not create a poster, vertical sheet, square canvas, or low-resolution preview.

Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one high-resolution comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Paper Wasp" / "Paper Wasp Nest", derived from the isolated paper wasp nest motif already generated in this conversation.

Reference use: Pull the visual system from a paper wasp nest: layered paper grey fibers, hexagonal comb cells, amber legs and banding, glossy black body marks, smoky translucent wing grey, dry garden alertness, structured signal language.

Canvas and layout: exact 16:9 3840x2160 design board, dense but readable product-system layout, large labels, precise 12-column grid, no tiny illegible token tables. Keep every card, button, input, chip, and panel radius at 8px or less.

Required visible sections: title "Morphous Paper Wasp", motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.

Include these UI examples: sidebar navigation, top navigation, command palette, search input, primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons with icons, icon buttons, text input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, card, modal, toast, tooltip, progress, table with rows, metric dashboard, line chart, bar chart, status timeline, empty state, loading state, error state.

Typography labels: readable English and Japanese with examples "Paper Wasp", "Alert", "Status", "Search", "Nest", "紙蜂", "警戒", "状態", "検索", "巣". Show guidance for Geist / Inter style Latin and Noto Sans JP.

Palette: paper white, wasp amber, glossy black, paper grey, smoke wing grey, dry garden sage support, deep umber shadow. Use amber for primary/focus/warning, black for command/navigation, paper grey for surfaces and borders, sage only as supporting success/data color.

Visual language: alert-strip dividers, hex-cell density modules, paper-fiber border texture, smoky translucent overlays, structured operational dashboard mood, shadcn/tweakcn-compatible components, premium realistic UI mockup.

Constraints: no purple/blue gradients, no neon, no honey bees, no honey jars, no hive box, no flowers, no random logos, no watermark, no stock-photo layout, no UI radius above 8px, no long paragraphs, no illegible microtext.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Create a 3840 x 2160 pixel 16:9 landscape image. Do not create a poster, vertical sheet, square canvas, or low-resolution preview.

Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one high-resolution comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Paper Wasp" / "Paper Wasp Nest". It must feel like the same system translated from the light board, not a new theme.

Reference use: Preserve the visual system from a paper wasp nest: layered paper grey fibers, hexagonal comb cells, amber legs and banding, glossy black body marks, smoky translucent wing grey, dry garden alertness, structured signal language. Translate the same motif-derived palette roles into dark mode.

Canvas and layout: exact 16:9 3840x2160 design board, dense but readable dark product-system layout, large labels, precise 12-column grid, no tiny illegible token tables. Keep every card, button, input, chip, and panel radius at 8px or less.

Required visible sections: title "Morphous Paper Wasp", "Dark Mode", motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.

Include these UI examples: dark sidebar navigation, top navigation, command palette, search input, primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons with icons, icon buttons, text input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, card, modal, toast, tooltip, progress, table with rows, metric dashboard, line chart, bar chart, status timeline, empty state, loading state, error state.

Typography labels: readable English and Japanese with examples "Paper Wasp", "Alert", "Status", "Search", "Nest", "紙蜂", "警戒", "状態", "検索", "巣". Show guidance for Geist / Inter style Latin and Noto Sans JP.

Dark palette: deep black-brown background, onyx command surfaces, dark paper-grey panels, warm paper text, wasp amber primary/focus/warning, smoke wing grey borders, dry garden sage success/data support, deep umber shadow. Avoid flat pure black; use subtle paper-fiber texture overlays.

Visual language: alert-strip dividers, hex-cell density modules, paper-fiber border texture, smoky translucent overlays, structured operational dashboard mood, shadcn/tweakcn-compatible components, premium realistic UI mockup. Preserve amber active states, black navigation surfaces, paper-grey panels, sage support status, and 8px-or-less radii.

Constraints: no purple/blue gradients, no neon, no honey bees, no honey jars, no hive box, no flowers, no random logos, no watermark, no stock-photo layout, no pure black flat page, no UI radius above 8px, no long paragraphs, no illegible microtext.
